---
title: "Meta Data"
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
fig-pos: H
format:
  pdf:
    colorlinks: true
    pdf-engine: xelatex
---

# Fern General
```{r, execute=FALSE}
## Do not use

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

# Relative path from project root
data_dir <- here("Meta", "Fern_General", "Business_Activity")

csv_files <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Read and combine
combined_data <- lapply(csv_files, function(f) {
  read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(source_file = basename(f))
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

# Remove exact duplicate rows
combined_data_dedup <- combined_data %>%
  distinct()

# write output
write_csv(
  combined_data_dedup,
  here("Meta", "Fern_General", "Business_Activity", "business_activity_aggregated.csv")
)

cat("Done. Aggregated file saved as business_activity_aggregated.csv\n")
cat("Rows before dedupe:", nrow(combined_data), "\n")
cat("Rows after dedupe:", nrow(combined_data_dedup), "\n")
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

aggregate_csvs <- function(path_parts,
                           output_name = "aggregated.csv",
                           dedupe = TRUE) {
  
  # Build directory path using here()
  data_dir <- do.call(here::here, as.list(path_parts))
  
  cat("Reading from:", data_dir, "\n")
  
  if (!dir.exists(data_dir)) {
    stop("Directory does not exist: ", data_dir)
  }
  
  # Get CSV files
  csv_files <- list.files(
    path = data_dir,
    pattern = "\\.csv$",
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  
  if (length(csv_files) == 0) {
    stop("No CSV files found in: ", data_dir)
  }
  
  cat("Found", length(csv_files), "files\n")
  
  # Read and combine
  combined_data <- lapply(csv_files, function(f) {
    read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
      mutate(source_file = basename(f))
  }) %>%
    bind_rows()
  
  # Deduplicate (optional)
  if (dedupe) {
    combined_data_dedup <- combined_data %>% distinct()
  } else {
    combined_data_dedup <- combined_data
  }
  
  # Output path
  output_file <- file.path(data_dir, output_name)
  
  # Write file
  write_csv(combined_data_dedup, output_file)
  
  # Logs
  cat("Saved to:", output_file, "\n")
  cat("Rows before dedupe:", nrow(combined_data), "\n")
  cat("Rows after dedupe:", nrow(combined_data_dedup), "\n")
  
  return(combined_data_dedup)
}
```

## Business Activity

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

# Relative path from project root
ba_data_dir <- here("Meta", "Fern_General", "Business_Activity")

ba_csv_files <- list.files(
  path = ba_data_dir,
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Read and combine
ba_combined_data <- lapply(ba_csv_files, function(f) {
  read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(source_file = basename(f))
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

# Remove exact duplicate rows
ba_combined_data_dedup <- ba_combined_data %>%
  distinct()

# write output
write_csv(
  ba_combined_data_dedup,
  here("Meta", "Fern_General", "Business_Activity", "business_activity_aggregated.csv")
)

cat("Done. Aggregated file saved as business_activity_aggregated.csv\n")
cat("Rows before dedupe:", nrow(ba_combined_data), "\n")
cat("Rows after dedupe:", nrow(ba_combined_data_dedup), "\n")
```

```{r}
ba_data <- aggregate_csvs(
  path_parts = c("Meta", "Fern_General", "Business_Activity"),
  output_name = "business_activity_aggregated.csv"
)
```


## Movement Between Places

```{r}
# Relative path from project root
mp_data_dir <- here("Meta", "Fern_General", "Movement_between_Places")

mp_csv_files <- list.files(
  path = mp_data_dir,
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Read and combine
mp_combined_data <- lapply(mp_csv_files, function(f) {
  read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(source_file = basename(f))
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

# Remove exact duplicate rows
mp_combined_data_dedup <- mp_combined_data %>%
  distinct()

# Write output
write_csv(
  mp_combined_data_dedup,
  here("Meta", "Fern_General", "Movement_between_Places", "movement_between_places_aggregated.csv")
)

cat("Done. Aggregated file saved as movement_between_places_aggregated.csv\n")
cat("Rows before dedupe:", nrow(mp_combined_data), "\n")
cat("Rows after dedupe:", nrow(mp_combined_data_dedup), "\n")
```
## Summary Statistics
```{r}
analyze_dataset <- function(df) {
  list(
    missing = df %>%
      summarise(across(everything(), ~mean(is.na(.)))),

    numeric_summary = df %>%
      summarise(across(where(is.numeric),
                       list(mean = mean, sd = sd),
                       na.rm = TRUE)),

    n_rows = nrow(df),
    n_cols = ncol(df)
  )
}

analyze_dataset(ba_combined_data_dedup)
analyze_dataset(mp_combined_data_dedup)
```


## Tennessee_Kentucky
